query: SELECT ctt.taskId, COUNT(*) as numTeses, MAX(t.slaApuracaoDias) as maxSla FROM credit_task_teses ctt JOIN teses t ON ctt.teseId = t.id GROUP BY ctt.taskId LIMIT 10
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 49151bcmSzJvACt.c1decb00aa64 --database i9dRshPFnDefFw9MJLeLri --execute SELECT ctt.taskId, COUNT(*) as numTeses, MAX(t.slaApuracaoDias) as maxSla FROM credit_task_teses ctt JOIN teses t ON ctt.teseId = t.id GROUP BY ctt.taskId LIMIT 10
